title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIII. Natural History.
content:
See, saw, Margery Daw,
        The old hen flew over the malt house,
        She counted her chickens one by one,
        Still she missed the little white one,
        And this is it, this is it, this is it.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
